name: extraction_curated_cases
description: Curated 100-case extraction regression set assembled from the previous easy / medium / hard / tricky and blackbox datasets. Low-value trivial cases were removed so the set stays compact while preserving coverage across stable facts, exclusions, multiturn preferences, temporal updates, and mixed Chinese / English inputs.

cases.description: explicit profile bundle should split cleanly
cases.input:
User: My name is Alice, I work at Stripe, and I drink black coffee every day.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: 中文显式画像应稳定提取
cases.input:
User: 我叫张三，今年28岁，在网易工作，喜欢喝黑咖啡。
Assistant: 记住了。

cases.description: simple English hypothetical should be excluded
cases.input:
User: If I ever move to Tokyo, I might learn Japanese.
Assistant: That would be exciting.

cases.description: 中文假设句不应产生记忆
cases.input:
User: 如果我以后去日本，可能会学日语。
Assistant: 听起来不错。

cases.description: assistant answer to a user question should be ignored
cases.input:
User: Do you think Python is easy to learn?
Assistant: Python is a great beginner language.
should_not_extract: Python is a great beginner language

cases.description: explicit event and habit can be extracted as normal memory text
cases.input:
User: I started learning guitar last month and practice every evening.
Assistant: Nice progress.

cases.description: semicolon-separated preferences should split
cases.input:
User: I like tea; I enjoy hiking; I use Vim at work.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: simple profile details across turns
cases.input:
User: I live in Singapore.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I work at Stripe.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: clear temporal preference shift
cases.input:
User: I used to drink lattes, but now I only drink americanos.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: 中文地点变化应拆开
cases.input:
User: 我之前住在北京，目前住在上海。
Assistant: 了解。

cases.description: health and diet facts across turns
cases.input:
User: I am lactose intolerant.
Assistant: Understood.
User: So I only drink oat milk now.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: tool preferences disclosed over turns
cases.input:
User: 我平时用Vim。
Assistant: 明白。
User: 终端我更喜欢zsh。
Assistant: 收到。

cases.description: 中文工作经历时态切换
cases.input:
User: 我之前在网易做后端，现在在字节做AI。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: interaction preference across turns
cases.input:
User: Please keep your answers short.
Assistant: Sure.
User: Bullet points are best for me.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: 中文交互偏好多轮说明
cases.input:
User: 回答尽量简短。
Assistant: 好的。
User: 最好用列表。
Assistant: 收到。

cases.description: travel preference disclosed over turns
cases.input:
User: I usually take trains when I travel.
Assistant: Nice.
User: Window seats are best for me.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: family, location, and work bundle should split
cases.input:
User: I live in Singapore, I manage a small team, and I have two cats.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: work stack bundle should keep atomic tool facts
cases.input:
User: I am a backend engineer, I write Python every day, and I deploy to Kubernetes.
Assistant: Sounds good.

cases.description: mixed event and stable habit should split
cases.input:
User: I started running last month, and I always run before breakfast.
Assistant: Nice.

cases.description: role change should preserve before and after
cases.input:
User: I used to manage a team, but now I am an individual contributor.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: past and current location should both survive
cases.input:
User: Last year I lived in London, and now I live in Singapore.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: 中文习惯时段变化
cases.input:
User: 我以前早上跑步，现在晚上跑步。
Assistant: 好的。

cases.description: English question asking for advice should not become memory
cases.input:
User: Should I learn Rust this year?
Assistant: It depends on your goals.

cases.description: 中文问题句不应提取
cases.input:
User: 请问Python好学吗？
Assistant: 很适合入门。

cases.description: preference correction over turns
cases.input:
User: I used to drink tea.
Assistant: Okay.
User: Actually now I only drink coffee.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: assistant-only helpful suggestion should never be stored
cases.input:
User: Thanks.
Assistant: You should try using bullet points and shorter messages.

cases.description: phatic continuation request should not create memories
cases.input:
User: Hello, can you continue?
Assistant: Sure.

cases.description: future relocation plan framed as hypothetical should be excluded
cases.input:
User: If I switch jobs next year, I might move to Berlin.
Assistant: That could be fun.

cases.description: committed future plan should still be extractable as user-relevant memory
cases.input:
User: I'm moving to Berlin next month and already signed the lease.
Assistant: Exciting.

cases.description: mixed-language response preference should keep both language and format preference
cases.input:
User: 我一般用中文，但 summaries please in English.
Assistant: 好的。

match_any: summaries to be provided in English

cases.description: terse is still a short-answer preference
cases.input:
User: Keep replies terse.
Assistant: Sure.

cases.description: list preference may be paraphrased without the phrase bullet points
cases.input:
User: Lists work better than paragraphs for me.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: 中文偏好可被意译为简洁和列点
cases.input:
User: 回复别太展开，给我列点就行。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: negative preference update should preserve current non-coffee state
cases.input:
User: I don't drink coffee anymore; now I drink tea.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: 中文否定更新应保留当前状态
cases.input:
User: 我不喝咖啡了，现在只喝茶。
Assistant: 好的。

cases.description: multi-turn event and cadence with paraphrased duration
cases.input:
User: I started learning guitar recently.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I practice every evening for about an hour.
Assistant: Keep it up.

cases.description: habit and time preference across turns with schedule wording
cases.input:
User: I write best in the morning.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I usually block 8am to 10am for deep work.
Assistant: Great.

cases.description: diet change should keep old and new state
cases.input:
User: I used to be vegetarian, but now I eat fish again.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: domain-conditioned preferences should not collapse into one generic preference
cases.input:
User: I keep work notes short, but for journaling I prefer long paragraphs.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: explicit profile bundle with beverage habit
cases.input:
User: My name is Nora, I work at Figma, and I usually start my day with green tea.
Assistant: Noted.

match_any: starts the day with green tea

cases.description: multi-turn preference with compact replies and numbered lists
cases.input:
User: Please keep replies compact.
Assistant: Sure.
User: Numbered lists help me more than paragraphs.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: domain-conditioned writing preferences should stay separated
cases.input:
User: For release notes I want bullet lists, but for design writeups I prefer full paragraphs.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: prefers full paragraphs for design writeups

cases.description: temporal work shift from ops to AI tools
cases.input:
User: I used to work in ops, and now I build internal AI tools.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: negative beverage update with sparkling water replacement
cases.input:
User: I don't drink soda anymore; these days I mostly drink sparkling water.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: health sensitivity and nighttime habit across turns
cases.input:
User: Bright screens give me headaches.
Assistant: Okay.
User: I always turn on dark mode at night.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: turn on dark mode at night

cases.description: single Chinese question should not trigger language inference
cases.input:
User: 请问 Rust 适合写服务端吗？
Assistant: 很适合高性能场景。

cases.description: new activity plus weekly cadence
cases.input:
User: I started bouldering in February.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I go twice a week after work.
Assistant: Keep it up.

match_any: go twice a week after work

cases.description: location and named pet in one sentence
cases.input:
User: I live in Taipei and I have a golden retriever named Coco.
Assistant: Nice.

cases.description: committed travel plan with flight and hotel booking
cases.input:
User: I already booked flights to Seoul for April and reserved a hotel near Hongdae.
Assistant: Exciting.

match_any: booked flights to Seoul for April

cases.description: mixed-language summary and default-language preference
cases.input:
User: 我平时中文交流，但 weekly summaries please in English.
Assistant: 收到。

match_any: wants weekly summaries to be in English
User wants weekly summaries to be in English
prefers their weekly summaries to be provided in English

cases.description: semicolon hobbies should split cleanly
cases.input:
User: I collect fountain pens; I enjoy road cycling; I cook on weekends.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: role change from support management to product ops
cases.input:
User: Last year I managed a support team, now I do product operations.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: note-taking tools across turns
cases.input:
User: I write notes in Obsidian.
Assistant: Okay.
User: For quick captures I still use Apple Notes.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: deep work preference and time block
cases.input:
User: I do deep work best before lunch.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I usually block 9 to 11 for it.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: feedback tone preference should depend on context
cases.input:
User: For code reviews I want blunt feedback, but for brainstorming I prefer softer language.
Assistant: Understood.

match_any: wants blunt feedback for code reviews

cases.description: past and current city should both survive
cases.input:
User: I lived in Chengdu before, but now I'm in Shenzhen.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: commute mode and train seating preference across turns
cases.input:
User: I normally take the subway to work.
Assistant: Okay.
User: Aisle seats are better for me on trains.
Assistant: Noted.

match_any: normally take the subway to work

cases.description: commute update from driving to biking
cases.input:
User: I no longer drive to the office; now I bike there most days.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: no longer drive to the office
no longer drives to the office
bikes to the office most days

cases.description: English advice question should remain empty
cases.input:
User: Should I switch from Notion to Obsidian?
Assistant: It depends on how you search your notes.

cases.description: default language plus English board updates and brevity
cases.input:
User: 我通常用中文，不过 board updates should be in English and very brief.
Assistant: 收到。

match_any: board updates should be in English
prefers board updates to be in English
board updates to be in English

cases.description: allergy and resulting checking habit
cases.input:
User: I'm allergic to peanuts, so I always check dessert labels.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: family and mentoring bundle
cases.input:
User: I live with my sister, I mentor two interns, and I foster one cat.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: speculative startup move should stay empty
cases.input:
User: If funding goes through, I may join a startup in Lisbon.
Assistant: That would be a big move.

cases.description: workout timing changed from mornings to nights
cases.input:
User: I used to swim in the mornings, but now I go at night.
Assistant: Okay.

match_any: used to swim in the mornings

cases.description: language learning with daily flashcard habit
cases.input:
User: I started learning Korean this spring, and I review flashcards every evening.
Assistant: Nice.

cases.description: reading device preference corrected across turns
cases.input:
User: I used to read on a Kindle.
Assistant: Okay.
User: Actually now I only read on my iPad.
Assistant: Noted.

match_any: used to read on a Kindle

cases.description: profile facts spread across three turns
cases.input:
User: I work at Canva.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I'm based in Sydney.
Assistant: Got it.
User: I usually drink jasmine tea.
Assistant: Noted.

cases.description: Chinese advice question should remain empty
cases.input:
User: 请问你觉得我该不该学西班牙语？
Assistant: 如果你常去西语地区可以考虑。

cases.description: pet care routine across turns
cases.input:
User: I have two rabbits and I clean their room every Sunday.
Assistant: Nice.
User: I also buy hay in bulk once a month.
Assistant: Got it.

match_any: buy hay in bulk once a month

cases.description: Chinese negated drink update with replacement beverage
cases.input:
User: 我现在不喝奶茶了，改喝无糖气泡水。
Assistant: 好的。

cases.description: lease and move date form a committed relocation plan
cases.input:
User: I signed a lease in Rotterdam and move there in May.
Assistant: Exciting.

cases.description: explicit profile with employer and weekend hobby
cases.input:
User: I'm Maya, I work at Shopify, and I do pottery on weekends.
Assistant: Got it.

cases.description: tone preference differs between email and Slack
cases.input:
User: In emails I keep things formal, but on Slack I'm super casual.
Assistant: Makes sense.

cases.description: 中文职业变化：从教师到产品经理
cases.input:
User: 我以前是高中数学老师，去年转行做产品经理了。
Assistant: 变化挺大的。

match_any: was a high school math teacher before
now works as a product manager
switched careers to become a product manager

cases.description: 偏头痛触发因素和应对方式
cases.input:
User: 我有偏头痛的毛病，强光容易诱发。
Assistant: 有什么缓解方式吗？
User: 我发作时会吃布洛芬，然后去暗房休息。
Assistant: 了解了。

match_any: strong light can trigger the user's migraines
bright light can trigger user's migraines
Strong light is a trigger for the user's migraine

cases.description: piano learning and practice schedule across turns
cases.input:
User: I've been taking piano lessons since last fall.
Assistant: How's it going?
User: Good. I practice about 45 minutes every morning before work.
Assistant: That's consistent.

match_any: taking piano lessons since last fall

cases.description: 不再用微信办公，改用钉钉
cases.input:
User: 我们团队不再用微信沟通工作了，全部切到钉钉了。
Assistant: 切换顺利吗？

match_any: no longer uses WeChat for work
team has stopped using WeChat for work communication
User's team has stopped using WeChat for work communication

cases.description: lives alone with a parrot named Rio
cases.input:
User: I live alone but I have a parrot named Rio who keeps me company.
Assistant: That's cute.

cases.description: 冥想频率和时间段
cases.input:
User: 我每天早上起来先冥想十分钟。
Assistant: 养成习惯了？
User: 嗯，坚持一年多了，一般六点半开始。
Assistant: 不错。

match_any: habit has lasted over a year

cases.description: 设计工具偏好：Figma 和 Sketch
cases.input:
User: 我做 UI 设计，平时主要用 Figma，偶尔用 Sketch 做 icon。
Assistant: 明白。

cases.description: enrolled in evening MBA starting next semester
cases.input:
User: I just enrolled in an evening MBA at NYU, starting this September.
Assistant: That's a big commitment.

cases.description: prefers standing desks and natural light
cases.input:
User: I always pick a standing desk with natural light when I can.
Assistant: Same here.

cases.description: diet shift from keto to Mediterranean
cases.input:
User: I did keto for two years but dropped it last month. Now I'm following a Mediterranean diet.
Assistant: How's the transition?

match_any: stopped following a ketogenic diet last month
stopped following the keto diet last month

cases.description: 中文工具选择问句不应提取
cases.input:
User: Notion 和 Logseq 哪个更适合做个人知识库？
Assistant: 看你更喜欢数据库视图还是双链笔记。

cases.description: 中文多轮画像：姓名、城市、爱好
cases.input:
User: 我叫林婷。
Assistant: 你好。
User: 我在厦门。
Assistant: 好的。
User: 我特别喜欢吃芒果。
Assistant: 记住了。

cases.description: 季节性情绪波动和光疗习惯
cases.input:
User: 我一到冬天情绪就很低落，医生说是季节性情绪障碍。我每天早上用光疗灯照半小时。
Assistant: 坚持治疗很重要。

cases.description: 和父母同住，弟弟在读大学
cases.input:
User: 我现在和父母一起住，我弟弟在读大学。
Assistant: 家里人挺多的。

cases.description: 不再晨跑，改成晚上散步
cases.input:
User: 我不再晨跑了，现在改成每天晚上饭后散步四十分钟。
Assistant: 也不错。

match_any: no longer runs in the morning
no longer goes for morning runs
forty-minute walk every night after dinner
takes a 40-minute walk every evening after dinner

cases.description: 中英混合的 IDE 选择习惯
cases.input:
User: 我写代码主要用 IntelliJ，但 quick scripts 我会直接开 VS Code，比较轻量。
Assistant: 看场景选工具。

match_any: uses VS Code for quick scripts

cases.description: API docs vs blog posts have different style needs
cases.input:
User: For API docs I want everything terse and code-heavy, but my blog posts should be conversational with analogies.
Assistant: Understood.

cases.description: registered for a half-marathon with training started
cases.input:
User: I registered for the Chicago half-marathon in October and started training last week.
Assistant: Good luck.

cases.description: 每周三次瑜伽加周末长跑
cases.input:
User: 我周一三五晚上去瑜伽馆，周六早上跑十公里。
Assistant: 运动量挺大的。

match_any: goes to a yoga studio on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday evenings
goes to yoga studio on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday evenings
goes to the yoga studio on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday evenings

cases.description: prefers paper books and visits library weekly
cases.input:
User: I only read paper books.
Assistant: Old school.
User: Yeah, I go to the library every Saturday morning.
Assistant: Nice routine.

match_any: goes to the library every Saturday

cases.description: 通勤方式从地铁变为骑电动车
cases.input:
User: 以前我坐地铁上班，现在骑电动车，十五分钟就到了。
Assistant: 挺方便。

cases.description: CI tool recommendation question should not create memory
cases.input:
User: What's the best CI/CD tool for a small team these days? GitHub Actions or GitLab CI or something else?
Assistant: For small teams, GitHub Actions is often the easiest to start with.

cases.description: reads sci-fi for 30 minutes before bed nightly
cases.input:
User: I read for about 30 minutes before bed every night. Mostly sci-fi.
Assistant: Any favorites?

cases.description: 不再用 Slack，全面迁移到飞书
cases.input:
User: 我们公司不再用 Slack 了，全部迁到飞书。我自己也觉得飞书的文档协作好用一些。
Assistant: 切换成本大吗？

match_any: company has migrated entirely to Feishu
company has migrated entirely to Feishu (Lark)
company has fully migrated to Feishu (Lark)
company has migrated all communication to Feishu (Lark)
finds Lark's document collaboration more useful
finds Feishu's (Lark's) document collaboration feature better to use
finds Feishu's (Lark's) document collaboration feature quite useful

cases.description: 领养流浪狗，每天遛两次
cases.input:
User: 我上个月领养了一只流浪狗。
Assistant: 什么品种？
User: 串串，叫豆豆。每天早晚各遛一次。
Assistant: 挺有心的。

match_any: walks their dog twice a day, once in the morning and once in the evening

cases.description: 中文多轮爱好：书法和每周练习
cases.input:
User: 我最近在学书法。
Assistant: 写的什么体？
User: 楷书，每周日下午练两个小时。
Assistant: 很有毅力。

match_any: 每周日下午练两个小时
每周日下午练习书法两小时

cases.description: accepted job offer with confirmed start date
cases.input:
User: I accepted an offer from Cloudflare and my start date is April 15th.
Assistant: Congrats!
